name: Oriath's End
explicitMods: 33% increased Charge Recovery
Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 30% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Ennui prevailed, until inspiration sparked
a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

name: The Gull
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
125% increased Evasion and Energy Shield
+46 to maximum Energy Shield
+77 to maximum Life
+32% to Cold Resistance
91% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
53% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the level of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: This Gem gains 100% increased Experience
+4 to Level of Supported Skill Gems
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: The Black Sekhema was a formidable fighter
alongside her dekhara, but she was unstoppable
when she fought atop her trusted mount, Shiyo.

name: Progenesis
explicitMods: 18% reduced Charges per use
31% increased Duration
When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead

flavourText: They were bred in a cosmic ocean of raw creation.
Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

explicitMods: Grants Level 30 Herald of the Hive Skill
+18% to all Elemental Resistances
+44% to Chaos Resistance
flavourText: All gates are closed.
All dreams are silenced.
What could have been...

explicitMods: All Elemental Damage Converted to Chaos Damage
Nearby Enemies' Chaos Resistance is 0
flavourText: Innocence rose to godhood not on inspired faith,
but on the vilification and hatred of another.

name: Headhunter
implicitMods: 8% increased Cast Speed during any Flask Effect

+40 to Dexterity

flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: The Golden Charlatan
explicitMods: +198 Intelligence Requirement
224% increased Physical Damage
16% increased Attack Speed
100% increased Critical Strike Chance
Critical Strikes with this Weapon do not deal extra Damage

flavourText: "He speaks, he leads, he stands tall...
yet, what has he truly done, save
spill our blood in pursuit of power?"
